target_0.brief_supporting_logic: target body shows extensive collapse; major structural elements missing or detached; debris field indicates catastrophic loss

summary: One target assessed: 1 building, condition DESTROYED with PROBABLE confidence. The scene shows a heavily damaged multi-story building with collapsed upper floors and a large debris field in front, set against a backdrop of another intact building under a partly cloudy sky. The likely functional impact is severe degradation or loss of capability for the assessed building.
